text:
Bucket (バケット, Baketto) is the Private Guard of the Second Prince Camilla in charge of killing the Third Prince Zhang Lei through a Nen curse. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 389 

Appearance

Bucket has thick, fair curly hair, heavy-lidded eyes, a bulbous nose, and thick lips. They wear the standard uniform of Camilla's private guards. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Upon hearing Musse's gunshots, Bucket tries to rush to the room where he and Prince Camilla are, but they find the doors locked. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 373 A few days later, while Camilla is confined to a room in the VVIP area, Bucket and most of her other bodyguards attend a meeting called by Sarahell about Shikaku's suicide. 

Abilities & Powers

Despite possessing a Nen ability, Bucket did not appear to be much stronger than a regular human physically, since they could be delayed by a locked door. 

Nen

Bucket is a Nen user and can cast the same curse as the other Have-Nots in Prince Camilla's employ. Their physical strength falling within the ordinary spectrum might suggest that Hatsu is the only technique they can perform, seemingly with the exception of Ten. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

The furigana name of the Have-Nots' curse is derived from Japanese mythology, specifically to Izanami's inability to leave the underworld due to having eaten of its food.
The kanji name of the curse, "Tsujitsuma Awase ni Umareta Bokura", is derived from a song by Amazarashi.
Viz localized the curse's name as "Dust in the Wind: Hell Fruit".
